message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in multiple analysis files

- closures.zig: Added genexp, if_expr, lambda, starred, keyword_args to
  findUsedVars; Added else_body for for/while, with_stmt, match_stmt,
  yield_stmt/yield_from_stmt to findUsedVarsInStmt; Added generator ifs
  to listcomp/dictcomp

- async_complexity.zig: Fixed checkPurity to add try_stmt, with_stmt,
  aug_assign; Fixed checkExprPurity to use correct AST names (.binop
  not .bin_op, .unaryop not .unary_op), fixed call.func.* dereference,
  fixed subscript.slice union handling, added boolop, tuple, if_expr,
  fstring, comprehensions, lambda, starred, keyword_args

- self_analyzer.zig: Fixed exprUsesSelfForWith to add keyword_args,
  binop, unaryop, boolop, compare, subscript slice union, if_expr, list,
  tuple, dict, fstring, comprehensions, lambda, starred; Added ann_assign,
  assert_stmt, yield_stmt, yield_from_stmt, match_stmt to
  stmtUsesFirstParamWithContext

- var_tracking.zig: Added else_body for try_stmt, match_stmt to
  isVarMutatedInNode and isParamReassignedInNode

- analyzeModule.zig: Added match_stmt, assert_stmt, ann_assign to
  stmtContainsAwait; Added match_stmt to stmtContainsYield; Added orelse_body
  for for/while, match_stmt to stmtCanError; Added boolop, fstring,
  comprehensions, lambda, starred, keyword_args to exprCanError
